insights.message: Low capital efficiency — ROE 6.4% (<10%) in FY2025
Profits are cash-backed — CFO/Net Profit ratio 1.61x in FY2025

anomalies.message: Total debt surged +149.7% YoY in FY2024 — significant leverage increase
